untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'unusual chart patterns' and 'sustained directional move (5+ bars)' which cannot be precisely encoded without custom pattern recognition logic or lookback array indexing. The entry conditions reference subjective pattern identification and multi-bar trend confirmation that exceed the capability of indicator-based comparisons alone. Approximated with ADX (trend strength), volatility regime shift (hvol_20, bb_bandwidth), and Donchian breakout exit logic as proxy indicators.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY emphasizes market regime awareness (hot/excitable vs cold/stagnant). Encoded as: ADX > 25 (trending regime), hvol_20 > 1.5 (volatility shift ≈ 2 std devs), bb_bandwidth increase (volatility expansion). Exit uses Donchian channel breakout as pattern invalidation proxy. Direction set CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal. Pattern confirmation bars and minimum trend bars requirements cannot be operationalized without historical bar array access.
